components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32

Cycron: From 40/s to 20/s 
Tenet Cycron: From 40/s to 20/s

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Hotfix 31.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Cycron having force feedback rumble when reloading while using controller.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed lingering muzzle FX on the Tenet Cycron

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fulmin (only when reduced to below 10 rounds on Semi-Auto firing mode), Flux Rifle, Kitguns with the 'Gaze' Chamber type and Pax Charge Arcane, Imperator/Vandal, Cycron, and Larkspur not recharging correctly.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the charging and firing sounds of the Cycron.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed poor optimization on weapons like the Ignos, Nukor, and Cycron.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.2.0 + 21.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Trick Mag applying to your Primary weapon when equipped on the Cycron.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Scourge and Cycron Status lasting longer for the Host.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
We have made some tweaks to last week's reinforcement: the Cycron! If you haven't picked this up yet yourself, the Cycron doesn't have a reload function; it has a recharge function. As of this Update, the Cycron battery recharge delay time is now halved when the mag is not empty. This means monitoring your ammo while feathering the trigger will be a good strategy when using this weapon. 
Adjusted the Rift weight of the Cycron beams in Limb’s Stasis to fix performance issues.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed not being able to equip Ruinous Extension on the Cycron.
Fixed issues with building up infinite Cycron beams in the Rift with Stasis.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.3.0
patchlogs.changes: *Grab the Cycron now by purchasing it in the Market or in Corpus Clan Tech research!
